steps.title: Introduce the exoplanet list
steps.content: The sentence moves from a complete setup about exoplanets at vast distances from Earth into a semicolon-separated list of examples. The punctuation must signal that the examples are being introduced.

steps.title: Place the list marker
steps.content: A and D use comma punctuation where the sentence needs a stronger list marker. C interrupts the phrase around Earth with commas. The colon after the introductory distance phrase sets up the examples that follow. The answer is B.
